headline: Ford Recasts EV Plans While Managing Recall And New Manufacturing Role
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) disclosed sharp ongoing financial losses in its electric vehicle unit and announced a reset toward hybrids and more affordable EVs, including canceled models and a major writedown. The company is scaling a manufacturing partnership with Sharrow Engineering that materially shortens production timelines for new marine propeller technology. Ford also issued a large recall affecting more than 420,000 vehicles due to a windshield wiper defect with safety implications. For you...
